subject: Re: NEWS
body:
thnaks


----- Original Message ----
From: "Maemarcia@aol.com" <Maemarcia@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, February 7, 2008 2:14:16 PM
Subject: NEWS


3 things......   Did you ever receive your birthday card ?  I thought it was too perfect! Would have loved to buy you a present bcs, It would have made ME happy -couldn't think of a thing.
2 ..I read & see you have so much extra on your plate. You are swamped.  Wish I could help!?
1...Me ?  heading for surgery - still planning and want reassurance but my head is about there.
Hi to all / a HUG to you.  To me, you are forever  your inner good guy, kind heart, & i like it .
me ,
Marcia M.
